response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and distributed-systems expertise with exposure to event-driven architectures and real-time systems, but lacks explicit experience in agentic AI production systems, fintech infrastructure, or executive-level leadership scaling teams beyond 30 engineers. His background in developer tooling and open-source contributions suggests adaptability, though alignment with the CTO role's AI-native fintech requirements is partial.
strengths: Proven experience with event-driven architectures and distributed systems, including low-latency microservices and real-time data processing.
Hands-on contributions to AI-agent infrastructure (e.g., MCP code generators) and developer tooling, indicating familiarity with agentic workflows.
Diverse technical leadership across multiple industries, including fintech-adjacent roles, with a focus on scalable, testable systems.
concerns: No explicit track record of building or operating multi-agent AI systems in production, particularly in regulated or high-stakes environments.
Limited evidence of executive-level leadership (e.g., scaling teams from 10 to 30+ engineers) or governance of hybrid engineering models.
Fintech experience is tangential (e.g., pricing optimization, investment platforms) rather than core infrastructure (credit systems, payment flows).
